boss_pitch: A giant, aggressively fashionable great white shark terrorizes a winter resort town by freezing the water and judging people's flimsy outerwear.
boss_original_quote: You're gonna need a bigger boat.
boss_punned_quote: You're gonna need a bigger coat.

boss_pitch: A ruthless mafia don tries to monopolize the local stand-up comedy scene by forcing rival club owners to sit through his mob enforcers' notoriously terrible open-mic routines until they surrender.
boss_original_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
boss_punned_quote: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't amuse.

boss_pitch: Armed with a .44 Magnum breathalyzer, a rogue vice detective aggressively interrogates inebriated bar patrons to enforce the city's strict last-call laws.
boss_original_quote: You've gotta ask yourself one question: 'Do I feel lucky?' Well, do ya, punk?
boss_punned_quote: You've gotta ask yourself one question: 'Do I feel lucky?' Well, do ya, drunk?

boss_pitch: A brave group of rebel space-dentists battles an evil, sugar-obsessed Empire to stop the dreaded Death Cavity from bringing ultimate tooth rot to the galaxy.
boss_original_quote: May the Force be with you.
boss_punned_quote: Decay the Force be with you.

boss_pitch: A disgruntled temp vendor  hijacks the corporate intercom system to furiously denounce the Human Resources department and their abysmal lack of dental benefits.
boss_original_quote: I'm as mad as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!
boss_punned_quote: I'm as mad as personnel, and I'm not going to take this anymore!

boss_pitch: An insomniac dumpster scavenger descends into madness as he patrols the gritty city streets, convinced that the piles of scattered rubbish are striking up conversations with him.
boss_original_quote: You talkin' to me?
boss_punned_quote: You talkin' to debris?

boss_pitch: A crazed geometry teacher drafted into the Vietnam War becomes obsessed with mapping out the exact, non-intersecting mathematical trajectories of airstrikes.
boss_original_quote: I love the smell of napalm in the morning.
boss_punned_quote: I love parallel of napalm in the morning.

boss_pitch: A winter caretaker slowly goes mad from cabin fever and transforms into an aggressively hospitable Italian chef who violently chops down bathroom doors just to serve his terrified family artisanal pasta.
boss_original_quote: Heeere's Johnny!
boss_punned_quote: Heeere's Giovanni!

boss_original_title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
boss_pun_title: Star Boars: The Ham-pire Slices Back
boss_pitch: In a galaxy far, far away, a young farm boy discovers the horrifying truth that the dark lord ruling the universe is actually a sentient, honey-baked pork product.
boss_original_quote: No, I am your father.
boss_punned_quote: No, I ham your father.

boss_pitch: A stranded alien tries to build a communication array in a suburban backyard, but faces his greatest challenge yet: navigating strict local zoning laws and getting approval from the Homeowners Association.
boss_original_quote: E.T. phone home.
boss_punned_quote: E.T. zone home.

boss_pitch: A ruthless Miami crime lord violently takes over the city's classical music scene, aggressively forcing his rivals to keep time with his tiny, pocket-sized metronome.
boss_original_quote: Say hello to my little friend!
boss_punned_quote: Say tempo to my little friend!

boss_pitch: Doc Brown and Marty travel through time in a steam-powered locomotive, quickly realizing that the space-time continuum has zero need for train tracks.
boss_original_quote: Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads.
boss_punned_quote: Railroads? Where we're going, we don't need railroads.

boss_pitch: A fierce space zoologist battles a terrifying swarm of hairless, cold-blooded extraterrestrial reptiles to protect her remarkably fluffy, warm-blooded galactic pet from being violently shaved.
boss_original_quote: Get away from her, you bitch!
boss_punned_quote: Get away from fur, you bitch!

boss_pitch: When an elite academy of stoner aviators gets drafted to fly supersonic jets, they must battle extreme G-forces to deliver a high-velocity harvest of premium sativa.
boss_original_quote: I feel the need—the need for speed!
boss_punned_quote: I feel the weed—the weed for speed!

boss_pitch: A swashbuckling fantasy epic where a vengeful swordsman tracks down the rogue labor boss who forcibly unionized his father into the local tradesman collective.
boss_original_quote: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. Prepare to die.
boss_punned_quote: Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You guild my father. Prepare to die.

boss_pitch: When heavily armed rogue 18-wheeler drivers take over a massive commercial freight depot, an off-duty cop must use his CB radio and barefoot pedal-shifting skills to save the convoy.
boss_original_quote: Yippee-ki-yay, motherfucker.
boss_punned_quote: Yippee-ki-yay, mother trucker.

boss_pitch: An Iowa farmer is compelled by mysterious whispers to plow over his corn crop and build a massive gazebo so the ghosts of a legendary barbershop quartet can return to aggressively hum in perfect harmony.
boss_original_quote: If you build it, he will come.
boss_punned_quote: If you build it, he will hum.

boss_pitch: A brilliant but extremely thirsty serial killer terrorizes the countryside by slurping entire major waterways dry, leaving nothing behind but quiet reservoirs and confused beavers.
boss_original_quote: I ate his liver with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.
boss_punned_quote: I ate his river with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.

boss_pitch: A hardened military colonel takes over a chaotic toddler daycare and quickly realizes his intense interrogation tactics are entirely useless against hyperactive three-year-olds.
boss_original_quote: You can't handle the truth!
boss_punned_quote: You can't handle the youth!

boss_pitch: A slow-witted but profoundly endearing Southern man inadvertently becomes the most sought-after obstetrician in American history, marveling at the unpredictability of delivering babies while offering assorted truffles to women in labor.
boss_original_quote: My mama always said life was like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get.
boss_punned_quote: My mama always said midwife was like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get.

boss_pitch: A lethal cyborg sent from the future to destroy humanity gets a remote office job instead, abandoning his mission to spend his days endlessly updating his chat status and avoiding real work.
boss_original_quote: I'll be back.
boss_punned_quote: I'll be slack.

boss_pitch: A time-traveling cyborg is sent back to the 90s, but his deadly programming is plagued by severe indecision and commitment issues, leaving every assassination attempt entirely up in the air.
boss_original_quote: Hasta la vista, baby.
boss_punned_quote: Hasta la vista, maybe.

boss_pitch: Two imprisoned men bond over decades, finding solace and eventual freedom by running a highly lucrative, illicit underground yarn-coloring and knitwear operation.
boss_original_quote: Get busy living, or get busy dying.
boss_punned_quote: Get busy living, or get busy dyeing.

boss_pitch: A manic agricultural agent writes a controversial memo about crop rotation and wins back his only client, an exhausted strawberry farmer, by romantically suggesting they just let the dirt sit there and rest.
boss_original_quote: You had me at 'hello'.
boss_punned_quote: You had me at 'fallow'.

boss_pitch: An insomniac office worker discovers a gritty underground society of aggressive birdwatchers who organize chaotic avian gatherings, strictly enforcing the rule that members must never aimlessly congregate.
boss_original_quote: The first rule of Fight Club is: you do not talk about Fight Club.
boss_punned_quote: The first rule of Fight Club is: you do not flock about Fight Club.

boss_pitch: In a dystopian simulated steakhouse, a rebel line cook discovers the ultimate truth about eating perfectly undercooked beef: the cutlery is just an illusion.
boss_original_quote: There is no spoon.
boss_punned_quote: Rare is no spoon.

boss_pitch: Forced to perform grueling HVAC repairs for the Emperor's amusement, a weary Roman technician victoriously empties the Colosseum's massive, rusted heating system and screams at the sputtering pipes.
boss_original_quote: Are you not entertained?
boss_punned_quote: Are you not drained?

boss_pitch: King Leonidas leads a phalanx of three hundred shirtless, over-caffeinated baristas to fiercely defend their premium Indonesian brew in the bustling capital.
boss_original_quote: This is Sparta!
boss_punned_quote: This is Jakarta!

boss_pitch: A clique of ruthless, fashion-forward high school plumbers dictates that the ultimate status symbol for teen popularity is accessorizing with heavy porcelain plumbing fixtures.
boss_original_quote: On Wednesdays we wear pink.
boss_punned_quote: On Wednesdays we wear sink.

boss_pitch: A brooding vigilante realizes fighting crime is futile, so he decides to permanently transform himself into a beautiful open-air structure to host Gotham's finest weddings and outdoor events.
boss_original_quote: You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain.
boss_punned_quote: You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the pavillion.

boss_pitch: Instead of winter magic, Queen Elsa curses her kingdom with an inescapable, Hitchcockian inner-ear imbalance that makes everyone desperately terrified of stairs and tall fjords.
boss_original_quote: Let it go.
boss_punned_quote: Let it vertigo.

boss_pitch: The rowdy frat bros of Delta House abandon their beer kegs for kombucha and achieve aggressive enlightenment by throwing a wild, campus-wide group stretching party.
boss_original_quote: Toga! Toga!
boss_punned_quote: Yoga! Yoga!

boss_pitch: A burnt-out replicant hunter faces an existential crisis not from a thrilling dystopian chase, but from the soul-crushing boredom of his 9-to-5 corporate desk job.
boss_original_quote: All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain.
boss_punned_quote: All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in mundane.

boss_pitch: A fiercely pastry-phobic archaeologist must navigate an ancient, booby-trapped bakery to recover a legendary dessert without succumbing to his crippling fear of baked goods.
boss_original_quote: Snakes. Why'd it have to be snakes?
boss_punned_quote: Cakes. Why'd it have to be cakes?

boss_pitch: Two terrifying linebackers acting as mob hitmen aggressively interrogate an indecisive opposing quarterback who keeps delaying the snap.
boss_original_quote: Say 'what' again. Say 'what' again, I dare you, I double dare you motherfucker, say what one more Goddamn time!
boss_punned_quote: Say 'Hut' again. Say 'Hut' again, I dare you, I double dare you motherfucker, say Hut one more Goddamn time!

boss_pitch: A doomed luxury ocean liner made entirely of enchanted shrubbery sinks after colliding with a giant iceberg of frozen pollen, while a blooming stowaway enthusiastically declares his floral supremacy.
boss_original_quote: I'm the king of the world!
boss_punned_quote: I'm the spring of the world!

boss_pitch: A troubled child psychologist tries to help a young boy who is constantly harassed by the ghosts of desperate door-to-door salesmen trying to close one last deal from beyond the grave.
boss_original_quote: I see dead people.
boss_punned_quote: I see dead salespeople.

boss_pitch: After being bitten by a radioactive baker, a nerdy teen gains the ability to shoot sourdough webs from his wrists and must protect New York City's bakeries from evil gluten-free villains.
boss_original_quote: With great power comes great responsibility.
boss_punned_quote: With great flour comes great responsibility.

boss_pitch: A ruthless, socially awkward Golden Retriever backstabs his furry best friends to build a multi-billion dollar canine neckwear empire.
boss_original_quote: A million dollars isn't cool. You know what's cool? A billion dollars.
boss_punned_quote: A million collars isn't cool. You know what's cool? A billion collars.

boss_pitch: A group of ragtag intergalactic tailors roam the cosmos fixing torn asteroid belts and mending rips in the fabric of the universe, one hasty stitch at a time.

boss_punned_quote: Nothing goes over my head. My reflexes are too fast. I would patch it.

boss_pitch: Five crooked contractors are brought in for a police lineup to identify a mythical, masonry-obsessed mastermind whose ultimate heist involved stealing the world's most foundational load-bearing block.

boss_punned_quote: We came, we saw, we kicked its class!

boss_original_quote: Your move, creep.
boss_punned_quote: Your groove, creep.

boss_pitch: A highly trained, deeply literal ex-assassin goes on a rampage across Europe to hunt down a legendary, perfectly honest man named True, brutally eliminating anyone caught lying along the way.
boss_original_quote: I will look for you, I will find you, and I will kill you.
boss_punned_quote: I will look for true, I will find true, and I will kill true.

boss_pitch: A rowdy fraternity of drunken stray cats terrorizes a college campus in their relentless, destructive quest to catch the dean's prized, party-crashing rodent.
boss_original_quote: Fat, drunk, and stupid is no way to go through life, son.
boss_punned_quote: Cat, drunk, and stupid is no way to go through life, son.

boss_pitch: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland where gasoline is secondary to community theater, a lone drifter must help a rogue director stage the ultimate high-octane Broadway musical on top of speeding monster trucks.
boss_original_quote: Oh, what a day... what a lovely day!
boss_punned_quote: Oh, what a play... what a lovely play!

boss_pitch: A time-traveling cyborg is sent back to the 90s to teach a rebellious teen how to parallel park and properly apply the emergency brake to prevent a future vehicular apocalypse.
boss_original_quote: There is no fate but what we make.
boss_punned_quote: There is no fate but what we brake.

boss_pitch: An aging, fedora-wearing rabbit races against evil foxes to uncover a legendary, untouched grassy meadow, groaning to his sidekick that a lifetime of frantic hopping has taken a severe toll on his furry joints.
boss_original_quote: It's not the years, honey. It's the mileage.
boss_punned_quote: It's not the years, bunny. It's the mileage.

boss_pitch: An epic, tear-jerking romance unfolds between an illiterate pigeon and a sentient, spell-checking word processor.
boss_original_quote: If you're a bird, I'm a bird.
boss_punned_quote: If you're a word, I'm a word.

boss_pitch: A retired pharmacist goes on a ruthless rampage across Europe to rescue his kidnapped daughter, armed only with a dangerously comprehensive knowledge of prescription medication.
boss_original_quote: I don't have money. But what I do have are a very particular set of skills; skills I have acquired over a very long career.
boss_punned_quote: I don't have money. But what I do have are a very particular set of pills; pills I have acquired over a very long career.

boss_pitch: When his daughter is abducted by international poachers, a retired special-ops dad who was mysteriously transformed into a mythical sea monster vows to track them down using his highly specialized underwater respiratory organs.
boss_original_quote: I don't have money. But what I do have are a very particular set of skills; skills I have acquired over a very long career.
boss_punned_quote: I don't have money. But what I do have are a very particular set of gills; gills I have acquired over a very long career.

boss_pitch: A retired CIA agent pivots to aggressive home renovation, using his very particular set of power tools to rescue his daughter's botched DIY project.
boss_original_quote: I don't have money. But what I do have are a very particular set of skills; skills I have acquired over a very long career.
boss_punned_quote: I don't have money. But what I do have are a very particular set of drills; drills I have acquired over a very long career.

boss_pitch: A traumatized ex-crop-duster must safely land a giant, flying botanical garden piloted by oversized bees after the insect crew passes out from a severe lack of sweet, floral fuel.
boss_original_quote: Roger, Roger. What's our vector, Victor?
boss_punned_quote: Roger, Roger. What's our nectar, Victor?

boss_pitch: A perpetually bronzed slacker gets mixed up in a complex Los Angeles kidnapping plot after someone ruins his prized tanning bed, forcing him to confront his aggressively sun-baked rival, Tan.
boss_original_quote: Well, you know, that's just, like, your opinion, man.
boss_punned_quote: Well, you know, that's just, like, your opinion, tan.

boss_pitch: A ridiculously good-looking but intellectually barren marine biologist uncovers an international assassination plot while trying to launch a high-fashion runway show exclusively for giant cetaceans.
boss_original_quote: But why male models?
boss_punned_quote: But why whale models?
